description: All 3 sections applicable: audit started, multi-day active, observation active. Balanced metrics.

isAuditStarted = false. Only Paragraph 1 renders. multiDaySummary.isApplicable and observationSummary.isApplicable both false.

Audit in progress, zero issues found across all sections. Tests zero-value handling and no bolding.
Audit near completion (90%+), high ZT and High risk issue counts. Tests bold formatting on critical values.

topNonCompliantGroups is empty array. Tests missing segment handling in Paragraph 1.
Multi-day audit active but all riskLevelIssueDistribution values are 0 across all days. Tests zero-value row handling.
All issues are Zero Tolerance only (ZT = totalIssues, High/Med/Low = 0). Tests bold/concentration rendering.
